name: frontend-ui-dark-ts
description: Build dark-themed React applications using Tailwind CSS with custom theming, glassmorphism effects, and Framer Motion animations. Use when creating dashboards, admin panels, or data-rich interfaces with a refined dark aesthetic.
capabilities: Create dark-themed React components with custom Tailwind CSS configuration
Implement glassmorphism effects using backdrop blur and transparent backgrounds
Add smooth animations using Framer Motion variants and page transitions
Build responsive layouts with app shell, sidebar, and page header patterns
Configure design tokens for colors, spacing, typography, and status indicators
Set up mobile-friendly UI with safe area insets and touch-friendly targets
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analysis flagged 69 potential issues, all of which are false positives. The flagged patterns (shell commands, hardcoded URLs, path traversal, weak crypto) are actually documentation examples and code templates in SKILL.md. No malicious code or security risks detected. This is a legitimate frontend UI skill for building dark-themed React applications.
valueStatement: Create modern dark-themed React applications with Tailwind CSS, glassmorphism effects, and smooth Framer Motion animations for dashboards and admin panels.
limitations: Does not include backend or API integration patterns
Requires React 18+ and Vite build environment
Does not provide pre-built component library - only patterns and templates
Glass effects may not work on older browsers without backdrop-filter support

useCases.title: Build a dark-mode admin dashboard
useCases.description: Create a professional admin panel with sidebar navigation, data tables, and status indicators using the dark theme patterns.

useCases.title: Design a data visualization interface
useCases.description: Build a data-rich dashboard with glassmorphic cards, smooth transitions, and custom color tokens for data visualization.

useCases.title: Implement a modern landing page
useCases.description: Create a sleek landing page with animated sections, glass overlay modals, and polished micro-interactions.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Dark Theme Setup
promptTemplates.prompt: Use the frontend-ui-dark-ts skill to set up a new React project with Tailwind CSS dark theme configuration. Include custom brand colors, neutral backgrounds, and text color tokens.
promptTemplates.scenario: Starting a new dark-themed React project

promptTemplates.title: Glass Card Component
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a glassmorphic card component using the frontend-ui-dark-ts patterns. Include backdrop blur, subtle borders, and proper dark theme colors.
promptTemplates.scenario: Building a card component with glass effect

promptTemplates.title: Animated Page Transitions
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement smooth page transitions using Framer Motion. Use the fade-in and slide-up variants from the frontend-ui-dark-ts skill for route changes.
promptTemplates.scenario: Adding animations to React Router navigation

promptTemplates.title: Complete Dashboard Layout
promptTemplates.prompt: Build a complete dashboard layout with app shell, sidebar navigation, page header, and responsive glass cards. Include status badges and data visualization color tokens.
promptTemplates.scenario: Creating a full admin dashboard interface

bestPractices: Use semantic color tokens (text-primary, text-secondary) instead of hardcoded colors for maintainability
Apply glass effects sparingly - overuse can reduce readability and performance
Test animations on actual devices - reduce motion preferences should be respected
antiPatterns: Avoid using pure black backgrounds - use neutral-bg colors with proper contrast ratios
Do not apply glass effect to all elements - reserve for elevated surfaces and overlays
Avoid excessive animation complexity that impacts page load or interaction responsiveness

faq.question: Does this work with Create React App or only Vite?
faq.answer: The skill uses Vite-specific features like env() for safe areas. For CRA, you would need to adjust the Tailwind config and CSS variables.

faq.question: Can I use custom colors instead of the default brand purple?
faq.answer: Yes, modify the brand colors in tailwind.config.js to match your design system.

faq.question: Do the glass effects work in all browsers?
faq.answer: Glass effects require backdrop-filter support. Older browsers will show a solid background instead.

faq.question: How do I add more animation variants?
faq.answer: Define new variants in the Animation Patterns section and add corresponding keyframes to tailwind.config.js.

faq.question: Can I use this with TypeScript?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill includes TypeScript examples and the configuration is JavaScript-compatible.

faq.question: Is this skill compatible with Claude Code and Codex?
faq.answer: Yes, this skill supports claude, codex, and claude-code tools.
